    W

    wall - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.blocks.Block
     
    weapon - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy

    Weapon - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons
    The Weapon class is an abstract representation of a weapon in the game.
    Weapon(int, int, double, double, double, double, int, double, BulletType, String, FireMode, String, String) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
    Constructs a new Weapon instance with the provided parameters.
    weaponBelongsToEnemy(Weapon) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
     
    weaponBelongToPlayer(Weapon) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Player
    Checks whether a given weapon belongs to the player.
    weaponBoxes - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
     
    weaponEntity - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
     
    WeaponEntity - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The WeaponEntity class represents a special entity used for in-game weapons that are containing weapon instances.
    WeaponEntity(double, double, String) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.WeaponEntity
    Constructor that creates a weapon entity at a specified location using the weapon's name.
    WeaponEntity(double, double, String, String) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.WeaponEntity
    Constructor used for creating new weapon entities.
    WeaponEntity(String, Weapon) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.WeaponEntity
    Constructor used for dropping weapons.
    weaponIcons - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
     
    weaponManager - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    WeaponManager - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    The WeaponManager class is responsible for managing and instantiating weapon types in the game.
    WeaponManager() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.WeaponManager
    Constructs a new WeaponManager and initializes the registry by scanning the designated package for weapon classes.
    width - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
    in radians
    WIDTH - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.WeaponEntity
     
    WIDTH - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
